Material Symbols (Outlined)
===========================

Bundled font file:
- material-symbols-outlined.subset.woff2

This is a SUBSET of Google's Material Symbols Outlined variable font, reduced to
only the icon glyphs Agent Debate uses (close, edit, refresh, settings, check,
done, error, stop, folder_open) plus their ligature rules.

Material Symbols are licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

Upstream: https://github.com/google/material-design-icons
License:  https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

The subset is generated from the upstream variable font with fontTools; it is a
mechanical reduction and remains under the Apache-2.0 license.
